identity_id.description: Identity on behalf of which the agent acted

state_changes.description: List of state changes caused by execution

trust_level.description: Trust level assigned to this agent

governance_approved.description: Whether governance has approved this agent

proposed_capabilities.description: List of capability and scope proposals with justification

agent_id.description: Agent the capability is bound to

revocable.description: Whether the binding can be revoked

max_financial_value.description: Maximum financial value allowed per period

max_distinct_actors_affected.description: Maximum distinct actors the agent can affect per period

max_asset_types.description: Maximum asset types the agent can touch per period

commands_executed.description: Commands executed in the current period

financial_value_moved.description: Financial value moved in the current period

enforced.description: Whether the quota is actively enforced

trust_level.description: Trust level conferred by this credential

revocable.description: Whether the credential can be revoked

delegated_capabilities.description: List of capability pattern and scope restriction objects

conditions.description: Delegation conditions including time, amount, and purpose restrictions

trust_level_issued.description: Trust level this anchor can issue

scope_of_trust.description: Domains or identities this anchor covers

assumptions_made.description: List of assumptions made during conversion

retryable.description: Whether the step can be retried

event_reference.description: The event that caused this entry

routing_decision.description: Full routing evaluation with scores and criteria

amount.description: Polymorphic value matching vault value model

recipient.description: Recipient identity and rail account reference

constitutional_gates_passed.description: Record of which constitutional gates were passed

auto_deny_after_deadline.description: Whether to auto-deny if deadline passes

evaluation_duration_ms.description: Duration of the evaluation in milliseconds

effective_until.description: When the rule stops being effective

last_modified_by.description: Identity that last modified this rule

domain_scope.description: Domain this policy set applies to

evaluation_strategy.description: How rules in the set are combined

conflict_resolution.description: How conflicting rule outcomes are resolved

active.description: Whether the policy set is active

governance_approved.description: Whether governance has approved this set

issuer_id.description: Identity that introduced the asset into SOVR

ownership_id.description: Current economic owner of the asset

beneficial_owner_id.description: Beneficial owner if different from legal owner

custody_provider.description: Who is physically/logically holding the asset

custody_location.description: Specific location or address where asset is held

face_value.description: Face value in native currency (for cash/stablecoin)

native_unit.description: The unit in which this asset is denominated (e.g., USD, wei, shares)

current_valuation.description: Current trusted valuation in reference currency

reserve_ratio.description: Required reserve ratio for this asset type

state.description: Current lifecycle state of the asset

proof_hash.description: Cryptographic hash of the attestation proof

block_height.description: Blockchain block height at time of attestation (if on-chain)

lock_id.description: Populated when reservation transitions to LOCKED

source_id.description: Identifier of the specific valuation source

reference_currency.description: Currency in which the price is denominated
